name: Trade Flow + OBI Consensus (Tightened)
hypothesis: The combined signal of realized trade flow (trade_imbalance_signed) and resting BBO imbalance (obi_1) is extremely powerful. Tightening the threshold will isolate the highest-conviction events, leading to an even higher win rate at the cost of trade frequency.
mutation_note: Following the recommendation to tighten the threshold, the trigger value was increased from 2.0 to 3.0 to confirm the signal's robustness and isolate a subset of trades with potentially higher predictive power.
